name: vscode-markdown-academic-preview
description: Academic writing support for VS Code Markdown Preview — citations, cross-references, subscript/superscript, and more (Pandoc-compatible, no Pandoc required)

markdownAcademicPreview.enabled.description: Enable or disable the Markdown Academic Preview extension for the current workspace.

markdownAcademicPreview.defaultCsl.description: Default CSL style name (e.g. "ieee") or file path. Used when no CSL is specified in YAML frontmatter.

markdownAcademicPreview.defaultBibliogra.description: Default bibliography file paths. These are loaded in addition to any files specified in YAML frontmatter.

markdownAcademicPreview.searchDirectorie.description: Directories to search when resolving bibliography file paths.

markdownAcademicPreview.cslSearchDirecto.description: Directories to search when resolving CSL style file paths.

markdownAcademicPreview.locale.description: Locale for citation rendering (e.g. "en-US", "ja-JP", "de-DE"). Empty string uses the default (en-US).

markdownAcademicPreview.popoverEnabled.description: Enable citation popover tooltips in the Markdown preview. When disabled, citations render as plain text without hover popover elements.

markdownAcademicPreview.completionEnable.description: Enable citation key autocomplete. When typing @ in a Markdown file, suggests matching bibliography entries.
